name: Ops Dash Connector
author: Legacy Sales Engineering
changelog: 1.7.0 — One-code pairing: connect a site by typing an 8-character code from Ops Dash instead of copying the long key; the plugin exchanges the code for the key automatically. Manual key entry moved to Advanced. 1.6.x — packaging + self-heal fixes, self-updating, robots.txt-sitemap-heading fixes.
